meta.title: Effect of isoleucine deprivation of rabbitpox virus DNA synthesis in mouse L cells -- Murphy and Ley 29 (2): 243 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: Synthesis of rabbitpox DNA was inhibited in mouse L cells deprived of isoleucine. Time-course patterns of incorporation of radiolabelled precursors into viral DNA revealed that synthesis of viral DNA began about 6 h after reversal of the isoleucine-deficient state.
